name: Hearty Potato and Leek Chowder
recipeIngredient: 3 Large leeks, cleaned and cut into half-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the leeks by cutting off the root end and tough green tops about 3-4 inches above the white part. Cut lengthwise and rinse under running water to remove sand. Slice into half-inch pieces.
2. In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
3. Add the leeks, potatoes, carrots, and onion. Cook slowly until soft, stirring often, about 8-10 minutes.
4. Add the chicken broth. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and let simmer until the potatoes are tender, approximately 25 minutes.
5. Gradually stir in the milk and continue cooking gently without boiling.
6. Stir in the fresh parsley, dried parsley flakes, salt, and pepper to taste.
